title: Drywall Calculator - Estimate Sheets, Tape, Mud & Screws
description: Calculate drywall materials needed for your project including 4x8 and 4x12 sheets, joint tape, joint compound, and drywall screws.

schemas.name: Drywall Calculator
schemas.description: Calculate drywall materials needed for your project including 4x8 and 4x12 sheets, joint tape, joint compound, and drywall screws. Includes a standard 10% waste factor.
